paragraphs: AI just got a physical body. Perplexity Computer and Manus can now control your screen, run code, and deploy entire projects.
Here are 3 things they can do that most CEOs don't know yet:
Perplexity Computer routes your request to 19 AI models in parallel — Claude for reasoning, Gemini for research, Nano Banana for visuals — all at once.
A project that takes a team a week gets done before your next meeting.

slides.bold_line: 2. It runs 24/7 — even when you close your laptop
paragraphs: Local agents die when your screen goes dark. Cloud-based agents like Perplexity Computer keep executing overnight — building, researching, deploying.
Wake up to a finished product, not a paused process.

slides.bold_line: 3. Zero setup, full control of your machine
paragraphs: Manus installs in minutes and runs terminal commands directly on your hard drive — sorting 10,000 files by content, building apps without an IDE, packaging code for deployment.
No Docker. No configuration. Just results.
I built a full breakdown comparing both systems and which one wins for each use case — PE, Consulting, Real Estate, Wealth Management.
Comment "COMPUTER" and I'll send it over.
